name: Banking & Financial Institutions
copTitle: Personal Data Protection Code of Practice (Banking and Financial Institutions) 2022

security.mfaScope: All online/mobile banking per BNM RMiT
deltaFromBaseline: MFA mandatory for all online/mobile banking
Dual breach reporting to Commissioner AND BNM
PCI DSS compliance for cardholder data
Real-time fraud detection and anomaly monitoring
Financial records disposal requires certificates of destruction

disclosure.thirdPartyTypes: Credit bureaus (CCRIS, CTOS), regulators, law enforcement
disclosure.consentRequirements: Credit bureau reporting per legal obligation; customer consent for product offerings
deltaFromBaseline: Mandatory CCRIS credit bureau reporting without data subject consent

consent.granularity: Lawful basis assessment per processing activity
consent.separateConsents: KYC may fall under legal obligation vs. explicit consent
deltaFromBaseline: KYC/AML processing may rely on legal obligation rather than consent
Separate lawful basis identification per processing activity
Dual reporting to Commissioner AND BNM
BNM incident reporting per RMiT requirements

dataIntegrity.accuracyRequirements: KYC data refresh cycles; credit bureau data correction
dataIntegrity.correctionSLAs: Correct inaccurate credit bureau data within reasonable time
dataIntegrity.verificationFrequency: Periodic KYC refresh per BNM requirements
deltaFromBaseline: Mandatory KYC data accuracy refresh cycles

provisions.title: KYC/CDD Data
provisions.summary: Customer due diligence requirements under AMLA with 6-year retention

provisions.title: Credit Bureau Reporting
provisions.summary: CCRIS/CTOS mandatory reporting and correction obligations

provisions.title: Online/Mobile Banking Security
provisions.summary: MFA mandatory per BNM RMiT for all digital channels
